candidates.why: Direct total revenue line and equals Net sales in the preview; appropriate top-line revenue label.
Also a valid top-line sales label; useful as fallback if reporting label changes across years.
Not the main top-line revenue; appears to be ancillary/other operating revenue.

variables.notes: Using a priority list for the reported revenue line; later code can take the first non-missing value.

No explicit COGS/cost of sales line is present in candidates or the statement preview. 'Raw materials and consumables' is the closest direct production-cost row, but it likely does not fully capture COGS because 'Change in inventories' is also part of production costs. Manual review needed.

candidates.why: Clear operating overhead component and preferred candidate.
Another operating overhead bucket that appears to capture administrative/selling/external operating costs.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A subtotal row is present. Selected the best overhead component rows. 'Other external expenses' was chosen from the full preview because the candidate list clearly missed an important overhead bucket. Excluded depreciation/amortization, balancing rows, and acquisition-related subtotal/balancing rows. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Other external expenses

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: This is amortization of previously capitalized R&D, not current-period R&D expense.
Balance sheet asset line, not income statement R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Capitalised & Development Costs - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Balance sheet contra-asset, not current R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Capitalised & Development Costs - Net - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing value on balance sheet, not R&D expense.

variables.notes: No current-period R&D expense line is visible. The available R&D-related labels are amortization or balance-sheet asset lines, which should not be used for XRD.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Best match for interest expense and preferred main reported line.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: A specific interest expense component; useful fallback if main line changes.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental duplicate of lease-liability interest, lower priority than the main statement line.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Priority list only; do not sum. Main preference is the reported interest expense line.

candidates.why: Direct equity total; appropriate because no separate parent-equity vs non-controlling-interest line is present.
Not equity; this is the full balance sheet total and should not be used for BE.
Also a direct equity line with identical values to Total Equity; useful fallback if label changes.

variables.notes: No owner/parent-only equity line or non-controlling interest line is shown, so total equity is used for BE and MIB is left empty to avoid double counting. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Balance Sheet] Equity

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income before Minority Interest - Total
